source_commit_note: Dispatch the architecture probe after implementation merge; keep scalable RTL equivalence blocked until its implementation is merged.

requested_items.objective: Stress long-context hierarchical score32 attention composition and select the scalable arithmetic architecture.

expected_result.reason: Do not extrapolate locally normalized 8-token outputs into a full Llama7B row.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #1251 and merge 6ec5fde0f7b5ab372d31f1c92bb2db1b534b13a3 at 2026-07-10T12:28:24.954671Z.

requested_items.objective: Prove score-buffer, global-max, exp-sum, weighted-numerator, final-divider, and backpressure equivalence for the selected scalable architecture.

expected_result.reason: Full-model PPA recost remains ineligible until the scalable normalization path is embodied and exact.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #1253 and merge edae0e6b123963ab0f8d486b59ab374300bef612 at 2026-07-10T12:45:30.987367Z.

requested_items.objective: Prove exact external score-SRAM and KV-replay stream behavior for all divider-folding points.

expected_result.reason: Physical measurement is ineligible until score-SRAM and KV replay handshakes preserve the selected arithmetic under independent stalls.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #1255 and merge a8c56fb7fd27b2be25d95abab5912aeaa47ee5dd at 2026-07-10T13:03:54.154779Z.

requested_items.objective: Measure Nangate45 timing, area, power, and cell count for 1/2/4/8 final-divider lanes.

expected_result.reason: Choose the minimum-area divider width that remains hidden by full-context replay service.

requested_items.notes: Prerequisites are merged; item is ready to queue. Merged via PR #1256 and merge 2431b5500e8700b573d6a18215619e0ac2b99eb5 at 2026-07-12T09:59:34.180012Z.

requested_items.objective: Prove exact two-pass stream behavior after replacing the timing-infeasible combinational divider with one restoring divider.

expected_result.reason: The replacement must preserve every final value bit and ready/valid schedule before physical promotion.

requested_items.objective: Measure whether the exact shared restoring divider closes 10 ns and quantify its area and power.

expected_result.reason: A 480-cycle final divide adds less than one percent to a 131072-token two-pass row while removing the 42.7 ns path.

requested_items.notes: Prerequisites are merged; item is ready to queue. Merged via PR #1265 and merge bad2ede11695ba20cbdbe1127e28a75773d409a4 at 2026-07-13T11:09:16.338455Z.

requested_items.objective: Reserve a measured 16 MiB score SRAM before KV packing and recost Llama7B latency, area, and energy.

expected_result.reason: The two-pass score store must consume concrete SRAM area, ports, and energy instead of borrowing the full shared-KV capacity envelope.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #1273 and merge 81fc7d8c9e7347407cf8a95ee49c7fb3c691f1fd at 2026-07-13T11:27:05.617258Z.

requested_items.objective: Measure native-checkpoint generation quality for the exact zero-tail two-pass score32 arithmetic.

expected_result.reason: The earlier score32 quality pass clamps out-of-range LUT deltas to exp(-8) and cannot be transferred to the implemented zero-tail profile.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #1272 and merge 3862bc198ff013db559fa64f0710a55a7cfd4a9d at 2026-07-13T11:27:09.946354Z.

requested_items.objective: Integrate measured iterative-divider PPA, score-SRAM cost, and zero-tail quality into the Llama7B frontier.

expected_result.reason: The frontier must charge divider latency, area, and energy together with score SRAM and the implemented zero-tail quality result.

requested_items.objective: Replace the slow replicated score32 wrapper with the measured dense producer plus exact global two-pass service and rerank Llama7B.

expected_result.reason: Transfer the measured score-SRAM bandwidth share into the fast dense-producer baseline while replacing, rather than double-counting, the old local vector-softmax component.
